troparion: (Tone 6) We prostrate before You with a contrite and humble heart,* and we pray to You, O Savior of the world;* for You are the God of those who return to You.
prokimenon: Then was our mouth filled with laughter.
second_prokimenon: If the Lord does not build the house,
in vain do its builders labour.
If the Lord does not watch over the city, in vain do the watchers keep vigil.
